TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Laulauzan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Maka go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 224 buwan, 759 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 718 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 41 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 73%, Paywan 17%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Laulauzan hya' ga Vecekadan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ laulauzan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu maka ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, rukaj **%, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na laulauzan ħjaʔ ɣa *eʦ~ʨeka*an. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Laulauzan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Maka go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 224 buwan, 759 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 718 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 41 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 73%, Paywan 17%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Laulauzan hya' ga Vecekadan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ laulauzan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu maka ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, rukaj **%, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na laulauzan ħjaʔ ɣa *eʦ~ʨeka*an. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
